supervisor.reason: The Cline option slice is implemented, focused regression validation passed, and remaining work is limited to optional broader end-to-end confirmation.

bootstrap.goal: Extend the Cline CLI adapter so Dormammu passes `--cwd <path>` and `--verbose` alongside `-y <prompt>` for visible operator output.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume from review of the Cline option slice. Focused tests are complete, and remaining work is optional confirmation against a real upstream Cline binary.
tasks.next_pending_task: Phase 6. Review residual compatibility risk against real upstream Cline builds and decide whether a broader end-to-end rerun is needed

items.text: Phase 1. Review the current Cline adapter, presets, installer defaults, and tests to find the correct injection points for `--cwd` and `--verbose`
Phase 2. Design the Cline invocation update so Dormammu passes workdir via the CLI flag while preserving existing prompt delivery behavior
Phase 3. Implement the adapter and preset changes for `--cwd <path> -y --verbose <prompt>`
Phase 4. Author and update regression tests for command planning, help parsing, config loading, installer defaults, and adapter execution
Phase 5. Run focused validation for the Cline option and output-visibility slice
Phase 6. Review residual compatibility risk against real upstream Cline builds and decide whether a broader end-to-end rerun is needed

next_action: Decide whether to run one broader end-to-end confirmation against a real Cline binary or to stop at the focused adapter and installer validation that already passed.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets Cline-specific invocation behavior rather than continuation prompt generation.
The implemented Cline changes are default `--verbose` support plus explicit `--cwd` forwarding when a workdir is supplied.
Focused unit and integration-style tests passed for command building, help parsing, config loading, installer defaults, and adapter execution.
